data.title: NEWS MEDIA ADVISORY: Ray Kurzweil Keynotes Absolute Security Resilient CISO Summit During RSAC 2026
data.description: Seattle and San Francisco—Absolute Security, a top enterprise cyber resilience provider, shared that futurist and AI expert Ray Kurzweil will be the keynote speaker at the upcoming Resilient CISO Summit. This event, organized by RSAC, will showcase Kurzweil's thoughts on "Cybersecurity in the Age of Exponential Intelligence." The summit will delve into the future of AI and its significance for cybersecurity leadership. The Absolute Security President & CEO will also participate in the program.

data.title: Potential for prolonged high oil and gas prices post-Trump's Iran conflict, impacting Americans long-term.
data.description: Despite the president's assurance of quick aid, Americans may experience lasting financial repercussions from the conflict long after its conclusion.

data.description: Potential gains for insiders surpass what regular shareholders can receive. The suggested deals might have conditions restricting better rival bids. Shareholders should reach out to the company to explore their entitlements and choices for free.

data.title: Nationwide Search for America's Taco Legends
data.description: In Orange County, California, on March 24, 2026, TacoTuesday.com revealed the transformation of The Golden Taco Awards, a prestigious national event for honoring Taco Legends. This platform is known for celebrating America's beloved weekly food tradition. The awards highlight exceptional individuals within the taco industry, emphasizing that not all accolades hold the same significance.

data.title: HelloNation Discusses When to Claim Social Security Featuring Financial Advisor Ash Toumayants
data.description: In State College, Pennsylvania, an analysis was conducted on the optimal timing strategies residents in Centre County should consider for maximizing retirement income. The study focused on determining the most effective age to start collecting Social Security benefits. The analysis aimed to provide guidance on how residents can enhance their retirement plans.

data.title: Mark Farrah Associates’ Health Coverage Portal Simplifies Health Insurance Data Analytics
data.description: In Pittsburgh, MFA utilizes data from state insurance regulators and statutory financial statements to compile industry metrics on health coverage in its Health Coverage Portal.

data.title: Kubex Named a Leader in GigaOm Radar Reports for Kubernetes Resource Management and Cloud Resource Optimization
data.description: Kubex has been acknowledged by a technology analyst firm as a top performer in Kubernetes Resource Management, ranking as a Leader and Outperformer in this area. Additionally, Kubex was recognized as a Leader and Fast Mover in Cloud Resource Optimization. The recognition was announced in Toronto on March 24, 2026, showcasing Kubex's pioneering work in automated resource optimization for Kubernetes, AI, and Cloud technologies. This recognition highlights Kubex's strong positioning in the market, especially with significant numbers indicating its leadership and performance in these crucial areas.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Roche/
data.description: Roche has introduced the cobas eplex respiratory pathogen panel 3, a rapid and thorough test designed to aid healthcare providers in managing patients with respiratory infections. Launched in CE markets on March 24, 2026, this test offers innovative and efficient technology to support clinicians. The company announced key advancements in the healthcare sector, providing crucial support for treating patients with respiratory illnesses.

data.title: REALTY ONE GROUP NAMED TO ENTREPRENEUR'S FASTEST-GROWING INTERNATIONAL FRANCHISES LIST
data.description: Realty ONE Group International, a prominent lifestyle brand, is experiencing significant growth worldwide. The UNBrokerage has been lauded for its rapid expansion outside the U.S., beyond the borders of America. This modern, purpose-driven company, recognized as ONE of the fastest-growing franchises globally, is based in Laguna Niguel, California. On March 24, 2026, the company was acknowledged for its global momentum.

data.title: Tether plans to undergo the first complete audit of its USDT reserves by one of the 'Big Four' firms. Firm not disclosed.
data.description: The stablecoin company chose not to disclose the identity of the accounting firm from the list of the 'Big Four' — Deloitte, PricewaterhouseCoopers, Ernst & Young, and KPMG.
